title: Tsutte Tabetai Gal Sawa-san
description: The only hobby Tsuruya-kun has after being a working adult for 3 years is weekend sea fishing. He was quietly fishing alone in the open sea, healing the stress of his daily life by casting a fishing line. But that's when a loud gal appeared out of nowhere. Tsuruya-kun's peaceful fishing life is sure to be thrown into turmoil!!
author: Funatsu Kazuki
